ValidationRule.description: Prevents stage change to Credit Check when Credit Status = Not Required.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Stage__c ), ISPICKVAL(Stage__c , "Credit Check") , ISPICKVAL( Credit_Status__c , "Not Required"))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Credit Check Not Required Please Move to Correct Stage (Credit Check is not required when approved in last 12 months for the Account)
